title: Reflections on Key AI Milestones of 2025
summary: 2025 marked a turning point for enterprise AI. This reflection highlights the milestones that defined the year and what they mean for 2026. The post Reflections on Key AI Milestones of 2025 appeared first on Fusemachines .
author: Fusemachines

title: Deciphering Secrets of Ancient Civilizations, Noah's Ark, and Flood Myths | Lex Fridman Podcast #487
summary: Irving Finkel is a scholar of ancient languages and a longtime curator at the British Museum, renowned for his expertise in Mesopotamian history and cuneiform writing. He specializes in reading and interpreting cuneiform inscriptions, including tablets from Sumerian, Akkadian, Babylonian, and Assyrian contexts. He became widely known for studying a tablet with a Mesopotamian flood story that predates the biblical Noah narrative, which he presented in his book "The Ark Before Noah" and in a documentary that involved building a circular ark based on the tablet's technical instructions.
